Power Assisted Equipment
description: Castle Point Borough Council (CPBC) via the Essex Procurement Partnership (EPP) is seeking expressions of interest from the market for the provision of a specialised, power-assisted exercise suite designed specifically for users with limited mobility or chronic health conditions. The equipment must utilise electronic power adjustment technology to assist the user's natural range of motion, allowing for passive exercise that is not possible on traditional resistance-based gym machinery.
